zh: 今天天气很好。
en: The weather is great today.

zh: 我昨天去了超市买东西。
en: I went to the supermarket to buy groceries yesterday.

zh: 数学真的太难学了。
en: Math is really hard to learn.

zh: 你知道你是谁吗？
en: Do you know who you are?

zh: 我爱上水课。
en: I love taking easy classes.

zh: 明天会下雨吗？
en: Will it rain tomorrow?

zh: 请把门关上。
en: Please close the door.

zh: 他比我高很多。
en: He is much taller than me.

zh: 这个问题太难回答了。
en: This question is too hard to answer.

zh: 我想学一门外语。
en: I want to learn a foreign language.

zh: 北京的冬天很冷。
en: Winter in Beijing is very cold.

zh: 你能帮我一个忙吗？
en: Could you do me a favor?

zh: 她每天都跑步。
en: She goes running every day.

zh: 这本书非常有趣。
en: This book is very interesting.

zh: 我不喜欢吃香菜。
en: I don't like eating cilantro.

zh: 我们去看电影吧。
en: Let's go watch a movie.

zh: 他的手机被偷了。
en: His phone was stolen.

zh: 这个地方真漂亮。
en: This place is really beautiful.

zh: 你吃饭了吗？
en: Have you eaten yet?

zh: 我已经等了两个小时了。
en: I've been waiting for two hours already.

zh: 会议推迟到下周了。
en: The meeting has been postponed to next week.

zh: 他说话的声音很小。
en: He speaks in a very low voice.

zh: 这条裙子太贵了。
en: This dress is too expensive.

zh: 你把垃圾扔了吗？
en: Did you take out the trash?

zh: 我忘了带钥匙。
en: I forgot to bring my keys.

zh: 他开车开得很快。
en: He drives very fast.

zh: 对不起，我不是故意的。
en: I'm sorry, I didn't mean it.

zh: 你能再说一遍吗？
en: Could you say that again?

zh: 这个苹果很甜。
en: This apple is very sweet.

zh: 我不想上班。
en: I don't want to go to work.

zh: 她笑起来很好看。
en: She has a beautiful smile.

zh: 这条路堵死了。
en: This road is completely jammed.

zh: 你的中文说得真好。
en: Your Chinese is really good.

zh: 小孩子都喜欢玩游戏。
en: All children like playing games.

zh: 天快黑了，我们回去吧。
en: It's getting dark, let's head back.

zh: 这件事跟我没关系。
en: This matter has nothing to do with me.

zh: 他是我最好的朋友。
en: He is my best friend.

zh: 别担心，一切都会好的。
en: Don't worry, everything will be fine.

zh: 你那是什么态度？
en: What kind of attitude is that?

zh: 我累得站不住了。
en: I'm so tired I can barely stand.

zh: 今天的晚饭我来做。
en: I'll cook dinner tonight.

zh: 他说话不算数。
en: He doesn't keep his word.

zh: 这个包裹什么时候到？
en: When will this package arrive?

zh: 你别管闲事。
en: Mind your own business.

zh: 她唱歌唱得很好听。
en: She sings really beautifully.

zh: 我迷路了，能帮帮我吗？
en: I'm lost, can you help me?

zh: 他刚才说什么了？
en: What did he just say?

zh: 时间过得真快。
en: Time flies so fast.

zh: 这件衣服不合身。
en: This piece of clothing doesn't fit well.

zh: 你怎么又迟到了？
en: Why are you late again?

zh: 我想请你喝杯咖啡。
en: I'd like to buy you a cup of coffee.

zh: 别碰那个，很烫。
en: Don't touch that, it's very hot.

zh: 他从来不生气。
en: He never gets angry.

zh: 我把钱包落在家里了。
en: I left my wallet at home.

zh: 这个菜太咸了。
en: This dish is too salty.

zh: 明天见，晚安。
en: See you tomorrow, good night.

zh: 你说得有道理。
en: You make a good point.

zh: 不用谢，小事一桩。
en: No need to thank me, it was nothing.

zh: 他对谁都很好。
en: He is kind to everyone.

zh: 我最近睡眠不好。
en: I haven't been sleeping well lately.

zh: 附近有地铁站吗？
en: Is there a subway station nearby?

zh: 请稍等，我马上回来。
en: Please wait a moment, I'll be right back.

zh: 你为什么不早说？
en: Why didn't you say so earlier?

zh: 这件事我需要考虑一下。
en: I need to think about this matter.

zh: 她的眼睛很漂亮。
en: Her eyes are very beautiful.

zh: 外面下着大雨。
en: It's raining heavily outside.

zh: 这个想法不错。
en: That's not a bad idea.

zh: 你最好去看医生。
en: You'd better go see a doctor.

zh: 我差点忘了。
en: I almost forgot.

zh: 别站着说话不腰疼。
en: It's easy for you to say.

zh: 她做的饭真的好吃。
en: The food she cooks is really delicious.

zh: 你说的跟做的不一样。
en: What you say and what you do don't match.

zh: 我只是开个玩笑。
en: I was just joking.

zh: 你到底想说什么？
en: What exactly are you trying to say?

zh: 他跑得比谁都快。
en: He runs faster than anyone.

zh: 这地方太吵了，我们换个地方吧。
en: This place is too noisy, let's go somewhere else.

zh: 我不想让你失望。
en: I don't want to disappoint you.

zh: 人与人之间应该互相尊重。
en: People should respect each other.

zh: 政府出台了新的经济政策以应对通货膨胀。
en: The government introduced new economic policies to combat inflation.

zh: 近年来人工智能的发展改变了人们的生活方式。
en: The development of artificial intelligence in recent years has changed people's way of life.

zh: 根据最新统计数据，失业率已降至历史最低点。
en: According to the latest statistics, the unemployment rate has dropped to a historic low.

zh: 两国领导人就双边关系进行了深入会谈。
en: Leaders of the two countries held in-depth talks on bilateral relations.

zh: 这项研究发现，每天运动三十分钟可以显著改善心血管健康。
en: The study found that exercising for thirty minutes a day can significantly improve cardiovascular health.

zh: 全球气候变化已经成为人类面临的最大挑战之一。
en: Global climate change has become one of the greatest challenges facing humanity.

zh: 调查显示超过百分之六十的消费者更倾向于在线购物。
en: The survey shows that over sixty percent of consumers prefer online shopping.

zh: 该法案在国会以压倒性多数票获得通过。
en: The bill passed Congress with an overwhelming majority.

zh: 科学家们正在努力寻找治疗这种疾病的新方法。
en: Scientists are working hard to find new ways to treat this disease.

zh: 这座城市以其丰富的历史文化遗产吸引了大量游客。
en: The city attracts a large number of tourists with its rich historical and cultural heritage.

zh: 教育是推动社会进步的最重要的力量。
en: Education is the most important force driving social progress.

zh: 专家警告说，如果不采取行动，情况将进一步恶化。
en: Experts warn that the situation will worsen further if no action is taken.

zh: 上海证券交易所今日收盘时指数上涨了百分之二。
en: The Shanghai Stock Exchange index rose by two percent at today's close.

zh: 互联网的普及使得信息传播的速度大大加快。
en: The spread of the internet has greatly accelerated the speed of information dissemination.

zh: 警方正在调查这起事故的原因。
en: The police are investigating the cause of the accident.

zh: 这项技术的突破将为清洁能源的发展带来新的机遇。
en: This technological breakthrough will bring new opportunities for the development of clean energy.

zh: 中国是世界上人口最多的国家之一。
en: China is one of the most populous countries in the world.

zh: 改革开放以来，中国经济取得了举世瞩目的成就。
en: Since the reform and opening up, China's economy has achieved remarkable accomplishments.

zh: 市场竞争的加剧迫使企业不断创新。
en: Intensified market competition forces companies to continuously innovate.

zh: 社交媒体对青少年的心理健康产生了深远的影响。
en: Social media has had a profound impact on the mental health of teenagers.

zh: 这条高铁线路将两地之间的旅行时间缩短了一半。
en: This high-speed rail line has cut the travel time between the two cities in half.

zh: 环境保护与经济发展并非不可调和的矛盾。
en: Environmental protection and economic development are not irreconcilable contradictions.

zh: 我们在做出最终决定之前需要收集更多的数据。
en: We need to collect more data before making a final decision.

zh: 这篇文章深入分析了当前房地产市场的走势。
en: This article provides an in-depth analysis of the current trends in the real estate market.

zh: 机器翻译的质量在过去几年里有了显著提高。
en: The quality of machine translation has improved significantly over the past few years.

zh: 国际贸易摩擦给全球经济带来了不确定性。
en: International trade frictions have brought uncertainty to the global economy.

zh: 疫情之后，远程办公成为许多公司的常态。
en: After the pandemic, remote work has become the norm for many companies.

zh: 老年人使用智能手机的比例正在逐年上升。
en: The proportion of elderly people using smartphones is increasing year by year.

zh: 网络安全问题日益突出，需要引起高度重视。
en: Cybersecurity issues are becoming increasingly prominent and require serious attention.

zh: 据报道地震造成了数十栋房屋倒塌。
en: It is reported that the earthquake caused dozens of houses to collapse.

zh: 这家公司因为产品质量问题被罚款五百万元。
en: The company was fined five million yuan for product quality issues.

zh: 我们应该尊重不同文化的差异。
en: We should respect the differences between cultures.

zh: 实现碳中和目标需要全社会的共同努力。
en: Achieving carbon neutrality goals requires the joint efforts of the entire society.

zh: 你觉得这个方案可行吗？
en: Do you think this plan is feasible?

zh: 他不仅学习成绩好，而且体育也很出色。
en: Not only does he excel academically, but he is also outstanding in sports.

zh: 无论结果如何，我们都已经尽力了。
en: Regardless of the outcome, we have already done our best.

zh: 尽管困难重重，他们还是坚持了下来。
en: Despite numerous difficulties, they persevered.

zh: 与其抱怨，不如想办法解决问题。
en: Instead of complaining, it's better to find a way to solve the problem.

zh: 既然你已经决定了，我就不再劝你了。
en: Since you've already made up your mind, I won't try to persuade you anymore.

zh: 要不是你提醒我，我肯定忘了。
en: If you hadn't reminded me, I would have definitely forgotten.

zh: 他不但不道歉，反而怪我。
en: Not only did he not apologize, but he blamed me instead.

zh: 只要坚持下去，总会看到希望的。
en: As long as you keep going, you will eventually see hope.

zh: 除非下雨，否则比赛照常进行。
en: Unless it rains, the match will proceed as scheduled.

zh: 她一边吃饭一边看手机。
en: She eats while looking at her phone.

zh: 你一走他就来了。
en: He arrived right after you left.

zh: 这道题连老师都不会做。
en: Even the teacher couldn't solve this problem.

zh: 他不但会弹钢琴，还会拉小提琴。
en: He can not only play the piano but also the violin.

zh: 虽然下着雨，但是街上人还是很多。
en: Although it was raining, there were still many people on the street.

zh: 因为堵车，所以我迟到了。
en: I was late because of the traffic jam.

zh: 如果要成功，就必须付出努力。
en: If you want to succeed, you must put in effort.

zh: 即使失败了也没什么大不了的。
en: Even if you fail, it's not a big deal.

zh: 他之所以成功，是因为他从不放弃。
en: The reason he succeeded is that he never gave up.

zh: 随着科技的进步，人们的生活越来越便利。
en: With the advancement of technology, people's lives are becoming more and more convenient.

zh: 在某种程度上，我同意你的观点。
en: To some extent, I agree with your point of view.

zh: 从他的表情来看，他似乎不太满意。
en: Judging from his expression, he seems not very satisfied.

zh: 考虑到实际情况，这个决定是合理的。
en: Considering the actual situation, this decision is reasonable.

zh: 就我个人而言，我更倾向于第一个方案。
en: Personally, I prefer the first option.

zh: 按照目前的进度来看，项目会延期。
en: Based on the current progress, the project will be delayed.

zh: 从长远来看，这项投资是值得的。
en: In the long run, this investment is worthwhile.

zh: 这个问题可以从多个角度来分析。
en: This issue can be analyzed from multiple perspectives.

zh: 实际上，事情并没有你想的那么简单。
en: In reality, things are not as simple as you think.

zh: 总的来说，这次活动是成功的。
en: Overall, this event was a success.

zh: 他解释了半天，我还是没听懂。
en: He explained for a long time, but I still didn't understand.

zh: 这件事说来话长。
en: It's a long story.

zh: 我看这事没戏。
en: I don't think this is going to work out.

zh: 他这个人就是嘴硬心软。
en: He talks tough but has a soft heart.

zh: 别拐弯抹角了，直说吧。
en: Stop beating around the bush and just say it.

zh: 你这是多此一举。
en: You're doing something completely unnecessary.

zh: 他说的头头是道，但做起来又是另一回事。
en: He talks a good game, but doing it is another matter.

zh: 你这招还真是管用。
en: Your trick really works.

zh: 做人要知足常乐。
en: One should be content with what they have and be happy.

zh: 他这个人靠不住。
en: He is not a reliable person.

zh: 我心里七上八下的，不知道该怎么办。
en: I feel very anxious and don't know what to do.

zh: 这种机会千载难逢，你一定要抓住。
en: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, you must seize it.

zh: 他的话让我恍然大悟。
en: His words made me suddenly see the light.

zh: 这件事让我左右为难。
en: This matter puts me in a difficult dilemma.

zh: 你不用杞人忧天，事情没那么糟。
en: You don't need to worry unnecessarily, things aren't that bad.

zh: 这是一箭双雕的好办法。
en: This is a great solution that kills two birds with one stone.

zh: 今天的会议取消了，具体时间另行通知。
en: Today's meeting is canceled, and the new time will be announced later.

zh: 请把这份文件翻译成英文。
en: Please translate this document into English.

zh: 我申请了五所大学，但是只收到了一封录取通知书。
en: I applied to five universities but only received one admission letter.

zh: 这台电脑已经用了五年了，该换了。
en: This computer has been used for five years, it's time to replace it.

zh: 他希望能在三十岁之前买一套房子。
en: He hopes to buy a house before turning thirty.

zh: 面试的时候HR问了我很多刁钻的问题。
en: During the interview, the HR manager asked me many tricky questions.

zh: 这份工作需要经常出差。
en: This job requires frequent business trips.

zh: 新员工入职后需要进行为期一周的培训。
en: New employees need to undergo a one-week training after joining.

zh: 我们公司的核心价值观是诚信、创新和合作。
en: Our company's core values are integrity, innovation, and cooperation.

zh: 他因为表现突出，被提升为部门经理。
en: He was promoted to department manager due to his outstanding performance.

zh: 年终奖金的多少取决于个人的工作表现。
en: The year-end bonus depends on individual work performance.

zh: 我们正在寻找有经验的软件开发工程师。
en: We are looking for experienced software development engineers.

zh: 这个项目的截止日期是下周五。
en: The deadline for this project is next Friday.

zh: 请务必在周五之前提交报告。
en: Please make sure to submit the report by Friday.

zh: 团队合作是项目成功的关键因素。
en: Teamwork is a key factor in the success of a project.

zh: 我们需要重新评估这个投资计划的风险。
en: We need to reassess the risks of this investment plan.

zh: 根据合同条款，任何一方违约都需要支付赔偿金。
en: According to the contract terms, any breach by either party requires payment of compensation.

zh: 为了提高效率，我们引进了自动化生产线。
en: To improve efficiency, we introduced an automated production line.

zh: 这个季度的销售额比去年同期增长了百分之十五。
en: Sales this quarter increased by fifteen percent compared to the same period last year.

zh: 客户的满意度是我们最关心的。
en: Customer satisfaction is our top concern.

zh: 请在登机前四十五分钟到达机场。
en: Please arrive at the airport forty-five minutes before boarding.

zh: 我想预订一间双人房，住三个晚上。
en: I would like to book a double room for three nights.

zh: 这个航班因为天气原因被取消了。
en: This flight has been canceled due to weather conditions.

zh: 去天安门坐地铁几号线？
en: Which subway line should I take to go to Tiananmen Square?

zh: 请问最近的加油站在哪里？
en: Excuse me, where is the nearest gas station?

zh: 我要办理入住手续。
en: I would like to check in.

zh: 这个行李箱超重了，需要额外付费。
en: This suitcase is overweight and requires an additional fee.

zh: 旅游旺季的时候景点人山人海。
en: During peak tourist season, scenic spots are packed with people.

zh: 我建议你去看看长城，它非常壮观。
en: I suggest you go see the Great Wall, it is truly magnificent.

zh: 请问这张票可以退吗？
en: Excuse me, can this ticket be refunded?

zh: 在中国开车需要国际驾照。
en: You need an international driver's license to drive in China.

zh: 这个博物馆每周一闭馆。
en: This museum is closed every Monday.

zh: 从机场到市中心打车大约需要四十分钟。
en: It takes about forty minutes by taxi from the airport to the city center.

zh: 我想换一些人民币。
en: I would like to exchange some renminbi.

zh: 请问这个座位有人吗？
en: Excuse me, is this seat taken?

zh: 这是一份给你的礼物，希望你喜欢。
en: This is a gift for you, I hope you like it.

zh: 如果有任何问题，请随时联系我。
en: If you have any questions, please feel free to contact me.

zh: 感谢你的支持和鼓励。
en: Thank you for your support and encouragement.

zh: 祝你生日快乐，万事如意。
en: Happy birthday, and may all your wishes come true.

zh: 很抱歉给你带来了不便。
en: I'm very sorry for the inconvenience caused.

zh: 听说你升职了，恭喜恭喜。
en: I heard you got promoted, congratulations.

zh: 欢迎来到北京，希望你在这里过得愉快。
en: Welcome to Beijing, I hope you enjoy your stay here.

zh: 谢谢你的款待，我过得很开心。
en: Thank you for your hospitality, I had a great time.

zh: 请代我向你的家人问好。
en: Please send my regards to your family.

zh: 久仰大名，今天终于见到你了。
en: I've heard a lot about you and finally got to meet you today.

zh: 下次来上海一定记得找我。
en: Be sure to look me up next time you're in Shanghai.

zh: 不好意思，我失陪一下。
en: Excuse me, I need to step away for a moment.

zh: 这是我的一点心意，请收下。
en: This is a small token of my appreciation, please accept it.

zh: 听说你生病了，现在好些了吗？
en: I heard you were sick, are you feeling better now?

zh: 希望我们以后还有机会合作。
en: I hope we'll have the opportunity to work together again in the future.

zh: 深度学习是机器学习的子集，它使用多层神经网络来学习数据的表示。
en: Deep learning is a subset of machine learning that uses multi-layer neural networks to learn representations of data.

zh: PyTorch 是目前最受欢迎的深度学习框架之一，广泛用于研究和生产环境。
en: PyTorch is one of the most popular deep learning frameworks, widely used in both research and production environments.

zh: 注意力机制使得模型能够关注输入序列中最重要的部分。
en: The attention mechanism allows the model to focus on the most important parts of the input sequence.

zh: Transformer 架构完全基于注意力机制，不包含任何循环或卷积层。
en: The Transformer architecture is entirely based on the attention mechanism and does not contain any recurrent or convolutional layers.

zh: 迁移学习允许我们将在大规模数据上学到的知识应用到小规模任务上。
en: Transfer learning allows us to apply knowledge learned from large-scale data to small-scale tasks.

zh: 训练数据的质量往往比数量更重要。
en: The quality of training data is often more important than the quantity.

zh: 过拟合是指模型在训练数据上表现很好但在测试数据上表现差。
en: Overfitting refers to a model performing well on training data but poorly on test data.

zh: 正则化是一种防止过拟合的常用技术。
en: Regularization is a common technique to prevent overfitting.

zh: GPU 的并行计算能力大大加速了深度学习的训练过程。
en: The parallel computing capabilities of GPUs have greatly accelerated the training process of deep learning.

zh: 自然语言处理是人工智能领域中最重要的分支之一。
en: Natural language processing is one of the most important branches of artificial intelligence.

zh: 强化学习中智能体通过与环境交互来学习最优策略。
en: In reinforcement learning, an agent learns the optimal policy by interacting with the environment.

zh: 策略梯度方法直接优化策略函数，而不是通过值函数间接优化。
en: Policy gradient methods directly optimize the policy function rather than optimizing indirectly through a value function.

zh: BLEU 分数是评估机器翻译质量最常用的自动指标。
en: The BLEU score is the most commonly used automatic metric for evaluating machine translation quality.

zh: 词嵌入将离散的词语映射到连续的向量空间中。
en: Word embeddings map discrete words into a continuous vector space.

zh: 自监督学习利用数据本身的结构来生成训练信号。
en: Self-supervised learning uses the structure of the data itself to generate training signals.

zh: 反向传播算法是训练神经网络的核心算法。
en: The backpropagation algorithm is the core algorithm for training neural networks.

zh: 批归一化层可以加速训练并提高模型稳定性。
en: Batch normalization layers can accelerate training and improve model stability.

zh: 残差连接解决了深层网络中的梯度消失问题。
en: Residual connections solve the vanishing gradient problem in deep networks.

zh: Dropout 是一种在训练过程中随机丢弃神经元的正则化方法。
en: Dropout is a regularization method that randomly drops neurons during training.

zh: 超参数调优是模型开发中最耗时的环节之一。
en: Hyperparameter tuning is one of the most time-consuming aspects of model development.

zh: 这个人总是言而无信。
en: This person never keeps their promises.

zh: 她的表演赢得了观众的热烈掌声。
en: Her performance won enthusiastic applause from the audience.

zh: 望着窗外的雨，他陷入了沉思。
en: Gazing at the rain outside the window, he fell into deep thought.

zh: 夕阳西下时分，天边的晚霞美得令人窒息。
en: At sunset, the evening glow on the horizon was breathtakingly beautiful.

zh: 他站在十字路口，不知道该往哪个方向走。
en: He stood at the crossroads, not knowing which direction to go.

zh: 那是一段令人难忘的经历。
en: It was an unforgettable experience.

zh: 随着时间的流逝，伤痛会慢慢愈合。
en: As time passes, the pain will slowly heal.

zh: 生活的意义不在于拥有多少，而在于给予多少。
en: The meaning of life lies not in how much you have, but in how much you give.

zh: 他深吸一口气，推开了门。
en: He took a deep breath and pushed open the door.

zh: 这一切来得太突然，让人措手不及。
en: It all happened so suddenly that no one was prepared.

zh: 我从来没有见过这么美的地方。
en: I have never seen such a beautiful place before.

zh: 他才华横溢，却始终怀才不遇。
en: He is immensely talented but has never found the right opportunity.

zh: 岁月在每个人脸上都刻下了痕迹。
en: Time leaves its marks on everyone's face.

zh: 有时候沉默比言语更有力量。
en: Sometimes silence is more powerful than words.

zh: 那条老街承载了太多人的童年回忆。
en: That old street carries the childhood memories of so many people.

zh: 失望就像滚雪球，越滚越大，最后把整个人都吞噬了。
en: Disappointment is like a snowball, growing larger and larger until it consumes the whole person.

zh: 他站在那里久久不愿离去，仿佛在等待什么永远不会到来的东西。
en: He stood there for a long time, unwilling to leave, as if waiting for something that would never come.

zh: 人生的道路上从来就没有捷径可走，每一步都需要踏踏实实地迈出去。
en: There are never shortcuts on the road of life; every step must be taken steadily.

zh: 虽然我不是很富有，但是我觉得自己过得很幸福。
en: Although I am not very wealthy, I feel that I live a very happy life.

zh: 他突然意识到自己一直以来都走错了方向。
en: He suddenly realized that he had been going in the wrong direction all along.

zh: 这个村庄虽然偏僻，但是空气特别清新。
en: Although this village is remote, the air is especially fresh.

zh: 那棵树据说已经有五百多年的历史了。
en: That tree is said to be over five hundred years old.

zh: 听到这个消息，她激动得说不出话来。
en: Upon hearing the news, she was too excited to speak.

zh: 每一次失败都是通向成功的一块垫脚石。
en: Every failure is a stepping stone on the path to success.

zh: 我们应该珍惜眼前的幸福，不要总是羡慕别人。
en: We should cherish the happiness we have and not always envy others.

zh: 不管前方有多少困难，我都会一直走下去。
en: No matter how many difficulties lie ahead, I will keep moving forward.

zh: 他的眼神里透着一种说不出的悲伤。
en: There was an indescribable sadness in his eyes.

zh: 春天来了，公园里的花都开了。
en: Spring has come, and the flowers in the park are all blooming.

zh: 在这个快节奏的社会里，很少有人能静下心来读书了。
en: In this fast-paced society, few people can settle down and read books anymore.

zh: 科技的进步不应该以牺牲环境为代价。
en: Technological progress should not come at the expense of the environment.

zh: 能力越大责任越大。
en: With great power comes great responsibility.

zh: 你觉得人生的意义是什么？
en: What do you think is the meaning of life?

zh: 为什么人们总是对未知的事物感到恐惧？
en: Why are people always afraid of the unknown?

zh: 幸福到底是什么？是金钱还是健康？
en: What exactly is happiness? Is it money or health?

zh: 如果给你一次重新选择的机会，你会做出不同的决定吗？
en: If you were given a chance to choose again, would you make a different decision?

zh: 这个世界上有真正的感同身受吗？
en: Is there truly such a thing as feeling exactly what someone else feels?

zh: 什么样的人生才算是有意义的人生？
en: What kind of life can be considered a meaningful one?

zh: 没有经过努力就得到的成功值得骄傲吗？
en: Is success achieved without effort something to be proud of?

zh: 你更看重过程还是结果？
en: Do you value the process or the outcome more?

zh: 如果时光可以倒流，你最想回到哪一天？
en: If time could turn back, which day would you most want to return to?

zh: 为什么越长大越不容易快乐？
en: Why does it become harder to feel happy as we grow older?

zh: 知识改变命运，这句话你认同吗？
en: Do you agree with the saying that knowledge changes destiny?

zh: 在当今社会，学历还像以前那么重要吗？
en: In today's society, is academic qualification still as important as it used to be?

zh: 如何才能在这个浮躁的时代保持内心的平静？
en: How can one maintain inner peace in this restless era?

zh: 人类最终会被人工智能取代吗？
en: Will humans eventually be replaced by artificial intelligence?

zh: 出国留学真的能开阔眼界吗？
en: Does studying abroad really broaden your horizons?

zh: 上海的房价为什么这么高？
en: Why are housing prices in Shanghai so high?

zh: 为什么有的人明明很努力却还是失败了？
en: Why do some people fail despite working so hard?

zh: 朋友之间最重要的是什么？
en: What is the most important thing between friends?

zh: 你觉得自己最大的优点和缺点分别是什么？
en: What do you think are your greatest strengths and weaknesses?

zh: 怎样才能学好一门外语？
en: How can one learn a foreign language well?

zh: 我的手机没电了，能借你的充电器用一下吗？
en: My phone is dead, can I borrow your charger?

zh: 你的新发型不错啊，在哪里剪的？
en: Your new haircut looks nice, where did you get it done?

zh: 这个周末有什么安排？要不要一起去爬山？
en: Do you have any plans for this weekend? Want to go hiking together?

zh: 我最近在学做菜，不过水平还很一般。
en: I've been learning to cook lately, but my skills are still pretty basic.

zh: 你听说了吗，小张下个月要结婚了。
en: Did you hear that Xiao Zhang is getting married next month?

zh: 今天我请客，大家随便点。
en: It's my treat today, everyone order whatever you like.

zh: 不好意思我来晚了，路上实在太堵了。
en: Sorry I'm late, the traffic was absolutely terrible.

zh: 你脸色不太好，是不是昨晚没睡好？
en: You don't look well, did you not sleep well last night?

zh: 这是我第一次来中国，一切都觉得很新鲜。
en: This is my first time in China, and everything feels so new to me.

zh: 明天我要去面试，有点紧张。
en: I have a job interview tomorrow, and I'm a bit nervous.

zh: 好久不见了，你最近过得怎么样？
en: Long time no see, how have you been lately?

zh: 你推荐的这部电影确实很好看，我昨天一口气看完了。
en: The movie you recommended is really good, I binge-watched it yesterday.

zh: 我觉得这件事还是当面说比较好。
en: I think it's better to discuss this matter in person.

zh: 那个新来的同事人挺好的，做事也很认真。
en: That new colleague is quite nice and works very diligently.

zh: 听说你最近在减肥，效果怎么样？
en: I heard you've been trying to lose weight, how's it going?

zh: 这个月房租又涨了，真受不了。
en: The rent went up again this month, I can't stand it.

zh: 你能帮我看一下这份简历有什么问题吗？
en: Could you take a look at this resume and see if there are any issues?

zh: 我打算下个月辞职，去追求自己真正想做的事情。
en: I plan to quit my job next month and pursue what I truly want to do.

zh: 你当初为什么选择了这个专业？
en: Why did you choose this major in the first place?

zh: 我觉得你跟她很般配，要不要我帮你牵个线？
en: I think you two are a great match, want me to set you up?

zh: 说实话你的方案确实比我原来的好很多。
en: To be honest, your proposal is indeed much better than my original one.

zh: 我们需要在这个周五之前把所有材料都准备好。
en: We need to have all the materials ready by this Friday.

zh: 我对这个决定持保留意见。
en: I have reservations about this decision.

zh: 这件事情我需要跟上司商量一下再给你答复。
en: I need to discuss this with my supervisor before giving you an answer.

zh: 请大家就坐，会议马上开始。
en: Please take your seats, the meeting is about to begin.

zh: 这份合同有几个条款需要修改。
en: There are several clauses in this contract that need to be revised.

zh: 我们上半年的业绩超出了预期目标。
en: Our performance in the first half of the year exceeded the expected target.

zh: 下周我要去深圳出差三天。
en: I'm going on a three-day business trip to Shenzhen next week.

zh: 这个方案虽然成本高一些但是长期来看更划算。
en: Although this plan costs more, it's more cost-effective in the long term.

zh: 请你把这个月的销售数据整理一下发给我。
en: Please organize this month's sales data and send it to me.

zh: 我们计划在明年第一季度推出这款新产品。
en: We plan to launch this new product in the first quarter of next year.

zh: 很遗憾地通知大家，这次的项目没有中标。
en: I regret to inform everyone that we did not win the bid for this project.

zh: 他已经被炒鱿鱼了。
en: He has been fired.

zh: 这家餐厅的菜做得很地道。
en: The food at this restaurant is very authentic.

zh: 你要几分熟的牛排？我要七分熟。
en: How would you like your steak? I'd like it medium-well.

zh: 这家店每天门口都排长队，一定很好吃。
en: There's a long line outside this place every day, so the food must be great.

zh: 我对花生过敏，这个菜里面有没有花生？
en: I'm allergic to peanuts, does this dish contain any peanuts?

zh: 四川菜太辣了，我吃不了。
en: Sichuan cuisine is too spicy for me.

zh: 中国人吃饭喜欢用筷子，我还在学习怎么用。
en: Chinese people like to eat with chopsticks, and I'm still learning how to use them.

zh: 早上一杯温水对身体很好。
en: A glass of warm water in the morning is very good for your health.

zh: 多吃蔬菜水果对身体好。
en: Eating more vegetables and fruits is good for your health.

zh: 我最近在尝试素食，感觉还不错。
en: I've been trying a vegetarian diet lately, and it feels pretty good.

zh: 每天保证充足的睡眠对健康非常重要。
en: Getting enough sleep every day is very important for your health.

zh: 他因为长时间的加班导致身体垮了。
en: His health broke down due to long periods of overtime work.

zh: 适当的运动有助于缓解压力。
en: Proper exercise helps relieve stress.

zh: 吸烟有害健康这是一个不争的事实。
en: It is an indisputable fact that smoking is harmful to health.

zh: 医生建议我少油少盐少糖。
en: The doctor advised me to reduce oil, salt, and sugar intake.

zh: 心理健康和身体健康同样重要。
en: Mental health is just as important as physical health.

zh: 他感动得流下了眼泪。
en: He was so moved that he shed tears.

zh: 她气得脸都红了。
en: She was so angry that her face turned red.

zh: 听到这个好消息，他高兴得跳了起来。
en: Upon hearing the good news, he jumped with joy.

zh: 我最害怕一个人待在黑暗的地方。
en: What I fear most is being alone in a dark place.

zh: 他心里充满了愧疚和自责。
en: His heart was filled with guilt and self-blame.

zh: 拿到录取通知书的那一刻，她激动得哭了。
en: The moment she received the admission letter, she cried with excitement.

zh: 我真的很讨厌那些不守信用的人。
en: I really dislike people who don't keep their promises.

zh: 他皱着眉头似乎在思考什么问题。
en: He furrowed his brows as if pondering some question.

zh: 突然的离别让他心中涌起一股莫名的不舍。
en: The sudden departure stirred an inexplicable reluctance to part in his heart.

zh: 看到孩子在舞台上表演，父母脸上露出了骄傲的笑容。
en: Seeing their child perform on stage, the parents showed proud smiles on their faces.

zh: 他的话深深地伤了她的心。
en: His words deeply hurt her feelings.

zh: 第一次站在这么多人面前讲话，我紧张得手心都是汗。
en: Speaking in front of so many people for the first time, my palms were sweating from nervousness.

zh: 谢谢你一直陪在我身边，我很感激。
en: Thank you for always being by my side, I'm very grateful.

zh: 时间就是金钱。
en: Time is money.

zh: 知识就是力量。
en: Knowledge is power.

zh: 失败是成功之母。
en: Failure is the mother of success.

zh: 天下没有免费的午餐。
en: There is no such thing as a free lunch.

zh: 活到老学到老。
en: One is never too old to learn.

zh: 一分耕耘一分收获。
en: No pain, no gain.

zh: 条条大路通罗马。
en: All roads lead to Rome.

zh: 说起来容易做起来难。
en: Easier said than done.

zh: 人不可貌相海水不可斗量。
en: Don't judge a book by its cover.

zh: 三人行必有我师。
en: Among any three people walking, one can be my teacher.

zh: 不入虎穴焉得虎子。
en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained.

zh: 千里之行始于足下。
en: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

zh: 机不可失，时不再来。
en: Opportunity knocks but once.

zh: 他说的英语带一点口音但是很流利。
en: He speaks English with a slight accent but very fluently.

zh: 这个单词怎么发音？
en: How do you pronounce this word?

zh: 学习语言最重要的是多开口说。
en: The most important thing in learning a language is to speak more.

zh: 我学中文已经三年了但是写作还是不太好。
en: I've been learning Chinese for three years, but my writing is still not very good.

zh: 你能帮我纠正一下发音吗？
en: Could you help me correct my pronunciation?

zh: 看美剧是提高英语听力的好方法。
en: Watching American TV shows is a good way to improve English listening skills.

zh: 我背了很多单词但一到说话就想不起来。
en: I've memorized many words, but can't recall them when speaking.

zh: 这个中文词语很难翻译成英文。
en: This Chinese word is difficult to translate into English.

zh: 学习外语最好有语言环境。
en: It's best to have a language environment when learning a foreign language.

zh: 每天坚持读英语文章对阅读理解很有帮助。
en: Reading English articles every day is very helpful for reading comprehension.

zh: 他不仅会说中文还会说法语和日语。
en: He can speak not only Chinese but also French and Japanese.

zh: 翻译的时候要注意两种语言的文化差异。
en: When translating, one must pay attention to the cultural differences between the two languages.
